mapper.insert:
/* ReviewImageMapper.insertAll */ INSERT INTO REVIEW_IMAGE (RVW_SN, FL_SN, RVW_IMG_SORT_NO) VALUES
(#{img.rvwSn}, #{img.flSn}, #{img.rvwImgSortNo})
mapper.select: /* ReviewImageMapper.selectUrlsByReviewSn */ SELECT F.FL_PATH FROM REVIEW_IMAGE RI JOIN FILES F ON F.FL_SN = RI.FL_SN WHERE RI.RVW_SN = #{rvwSn} AND F.FL_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY RI.RVW_IMG_SORT_NO
